description: Create the 'Como Funciona' page, the 'Partners/Auvesta' page, and the 'Blog/Guias' page. These complete the informational funnel.
steps: Create frontend/como-funciona.html - How it works page. Structure as a clear step-by-step process: (1) Initial contact - speak with Kepa to understand your situation, (2) Personalized orientation - Kepa explains options adapted to you, (3) Choose your plan - from 25 EUR/month, choose metals and quantities, (4) Physical metals acquired - real metals purchased and stored securely in your name, (5) Custody in Zurich - your metals stored in insured vaults, (6) Full flexibility - no lock-in, sell/withdraw anytime. Include a FAQ section addressing common questions (minimum amounts, how custody works, is it safe, what about taxes, can I get physical delivery). End with strong CTA to contact Kepa. Use timeline/steps visual design.

Create frontend/partners.html - Partners/Auvesta page. Explain the collaboration model: (1) Who is AUVESTA Edelmetalle AG (German company, 17+ years, 200k+ investors, 134 countries, one of Europe's largest precious metals traders), (2) Why Kepa works with AUVESTA (trust, track record, transparency, regulated), (3) How the partner model works at a high level (without getting into MLM details - focus on collaboration and accessibility), (4) Benefits for the client (access through a personal advisor, not just an anonymous platform), (5) CTA to learn more / become a partner / contact Kepa. Keep this professional and clear.

Create frontend/blog.html - Blog/Guides listing page. Create a grid layout showing 3-4 placeholder article cards with titles like: 'Por que el oro protege tu patrimonio', 'Diferencias entre oro fisico y ETFs', 'Como empezar a ahorrar en metales desde 25 EUR', 'Guia para principiantes: plata de inversion'. Each card should have a title, brief excerpt, date, and a 'Leer mas' link. The links can point to '#' for now (future phase will add full articles). Include a section explaining what the blog will cover and a newsletter signup CTA placeholder.
All three pages must use shared navigation (with correct active state), footer, WhatsApp button, reveal animations. Consistent with the premium black/gold design.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/como-funciona.html shows a clear step-by-step process with 5-6 steps
frontend/como-funciona.html includes a FAQ section with at least 5 questions
frontend/partners.html explains AUVESTA and the collaboration professionally
frontend/partners.html does not use MLM language, focuses on trust and partnership
frontend/blog.html displays a grid of 3-4 article placeholder cards
All three pages use shared nav, footer, WhatsApp button
All pages are responsive and follow the premium design system
No financial advice or profitability promises on any page
verification: Open frontend/como-funciona.html and verify step-by-step process and FAQ section render correctly
Open frontend/partners.html and verify AUVESTA information is professional and clear
Open frontend/blog.html and verify article card grid displays correctly
Verify navigation active states on each page
